data.title: Taiwan seals trade pact with U.S., slashes tariffs to 15% and pledges to build more chip factories in America.
data.description: The United States has recently decreased tariffs imposed on products from Taiwan from 20 percent to 15 percent. In response, Taiwan has announced plans to increase its investments in chip manufacturing within the United States. This decision marks a significant development in economic relations between the two countries, potentially leading to increased trade and collaboration in the technology sector.

data.title: Kaito discontinues 'Yaps' as X blocks 'AI slop' payments, causing 15% drop in Kaito and Cookie DAO tokens. User experience to improve - Nikita Bier.
data.description: Following X's ban, both Kaito.ai and Cookie DAO tokens experienced a significant drop of more than 15%. Nikita Bier, the head of product at X, mentioned that this decision is intended to enhance the user experience on the social media platform.

data.title: Judge allows Empire Wind, owned by Equinor with 54 turbines, to resume offshore construction despite national security and aviation safety concerns raised by Green Oceans.
data.description: In Washington, Judge Carl Nichols approved Empire Wind's plea to recommence offshore construction (Case no. 1:26-cv-00004-CJN). The environmental nonprofit, Green Oceans, highlighted worries over potential national-security and aviation safety issues tied to the offshore wind project. Empire Wind, under Equinor, features a setup of 54 turbines, starting 12 nautical miles off the coast, raising concerns despite the recent legal clearance granted.

data.title: Antengene presents strong clinical data update at JPM, focusing on next-gen ADCs and TCEs.SEHK:6996.HK. Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Antengene Corporation Limited (SEHK: 6996.HK), a top global biotech firm, based in Shanghai and Hong Kong, is committed to innovating and commercializing advanced medicines. Antengene focuses on developing and marketing cutting-edge drugs, striving to lead the way in the industry.

data.title: Minerva University launches Executive Leadership Program in Tokyo with Nippon Foundation support.
data.description: Minerva University, in collaboration with the Nippon Foundation, has introduced a new program on January 15, 2026, aimed at equipping international executives to effectively manage complexity, operate across borders, and make a significant impact. The initiative, titled World Wise Executive Leadership, offers a comprehensive approach to developing leadership capabilities in a global context. This program has garnered substantial backing from the Nippon Foundation and seeks to address the challenges faced by executives in today's interconnected world.

data.title: MOVA unveils the 'M∞VA Universe' at Silicon Valley launch, positioning as global premium AI smart living leader.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in San Jose, California, MOVA, a leading Global AI Smart Living company, held its "M∞VA Universe" global launch event. This event signifies the brand's expansion into the upscale global market, revealing a comprehensive ecosystem of innovative products and services.
